# Zasta Group

> Zasta Group delivers infrastructure workforce solutions, construction management, and digital project tools for mega-projects worldwide. Based in Hyderabad since 2016.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Zasta Group's infrastructure services and global capabilities.
- [About](/about): Company history, leadership, and mission.
- [Services](/services): Workforce deployment, construction management, and engineering consultancy.
- [Careers](/careers): Open roles and CV submission for construction and engineering professionals.
- [Credentials](/credentials): D-U-N-S Number, registrations, and verified business identity.
- [Contact](/contact): Hyderabad office details and inquiry form.

## Optional

- [Privacy](/privacy)
- [Terms](/terms)
